debt.introduced_by: pre-M00 protocol scaffold; recorded by WP-M00-002
debt.reason: Existing canonical proto files all declare package dennett.v1, while ARCH-81 defines subsystem packages such as dennett.common.v1 and dennett.control.v1. Renaming now would be a public breaking change forbidden by AB-M00-002.
debt.consequence: M00 generated type paths and gRPC full method names reflect dennett.v1 and must not be treated as the final public package layout.
debt.repayment_trigger: Before the first production or external consumer compiles generated clients, execute a dedicated protocol-epoch package with migration and compatibility evidence.
